generalization.notes: Adopted kitab `comments@0.2.0` contract. Portable surface uses polymorphic `TargetRef = { kind, id, subId? }` — no `pageId` / `blockId` / `targetType` literals. Props-driven `useCommentsCore(bindings, opts)` matches the kitab `useComments` hook (renamed locally to avoid colliding with the back-compat `useComments` consumer alias). Renderless wrappers `CommentsAnchor` + `CommentsThread` ship as the kitab v0.2.0 components. Existing renderless `CommentsProvider` / `useThreadComments` / `ThreadPopover` retained alongside as the context-based alternative. All Convex bindings + Nosion-store viewer wiring isolated under `adapters/{nosion,nosionStandalone,PageCommentsPanel}` and excluded from the kitab UP-sync surface. Slice index re-exports back-compat aliases (`PageCommentsProvider`, `useBlockComments`, `BlockCommentsPopover`, `PageCommentsPanel`, `useComments`, `usePageComments`, `useStandaloneComments`) so existing call sites in `editor/`, `databases/`, and `analytics/` continue to compile unchanged.
